title: Wire theme provider and toggle into root layout
description: ThemeProvider wraps app. ThemeToggle in header or top. Init script applies theme before paint. Replace or extend existing theme logic.
acceptanceCriteria: ThemeToggle visible at top of page
Init script applies stored theme to html before body
No flash of wrong theme on load

steps.details: In lib/src/routes/__root.tsx, wrap TanStackQueryProvider children with ThemeProvider. Ensure ThemeProvider is client component.
In Header component, add ThemeToggle. Or add fixed ThemeToggle at top if header is simplified.
Replace THEME_INIT_SCRIPT to support daylight,dusk,nighttime,morning. Read localStorage, validate, set data-theme on documentElement.
Load page, cycle theme, refresh. Confirm theme persists and no flash.

technicalNotes: Header/Footer may need simplification for minimal portfolio
